NEW CHAMPIONS

After discovering his uncle Roderick Kingsley’s Goblin legacy, Phil Urich became Hobgoblin, tearing through New York on a screaming glider, his pumpkin bombs and razor bats fueled by rage rather than control. 


Black Tarantula 
Carlos LaMuerte is not the first Black Tarantula, and he won’t be the last. After his wife fled to New York with their son and his heir, Carlos followed, bringing his strength to a world of superheroes, supervillains, and ninjas!


N

title: Match Villains

Fireworks up, summer on. 100 new levels await!

NEW ITEM: LAVA BORDER! The board looks quiet… maybe too quiet. Make matches and reveal what’s hiding under the heat.

NEW EVENT: MUSEUM BREAK! Tick-tock, Villains. Move deeper into the museum, grab the rewards, and try not to look too suspicious.

NEW SAFE CRACKERS: JULY FOURTH! Crack safes and unlock a firework-ready NEW STYLE.

NEW POSTER: ANCIENT GIANTS! Big heads, bigger secrets. These ancient faces know something.

Stay sharp, Villains!

Summer is in full swing, and it's time for festivities in Hopewell Bay! Here's what you can look forward to in our latest update:

• Find out what's cooking in our newest area, the Kitchen! 
• After the soccer excitement, get ready to unleash Hopewell Bay's local music talent!
• Enjoy a variety of fun events and exciting Season Passes packed with rewards.
• The "Settings" button is back, making access easier, along with other fixes and improvements.

Have a fun summer in Hopewell Bay!
